It darts across the battlefield like a blur, making it almost impossible to catch. Strapped to its back is a powerful C4 explosive, turning this frantic creature into a high-speed suicide bomber. It is a chaotic result of Henry's madness‚ÄĒa loyal, feathered weapon that delivers a devastating blast before the enemy even realizes what hit them.

name: Hornets
trait: U√ßan kartlardan -50%, Heyvan tipli kartlardan -25% daha az hasar alar
story: The Swarm of Stingers, a colossal airborne swarm of prehistoric hornets dragged through a mana portal from an ancient forgotten ecosystem. These are not ordinary insects but massive, highly aggressive hornets infused with raw mana energy, transformed into a terrifying living storm of wings, armored bodies, and deadly stingers. Thousands of gigantic prehistoric hornets fill the sky in a dense, synchronized swarm. Their bodies feature rugged exoskeletons reinforced by evolution and mana, with sharp segmented armor plates, powerful mandibles, glowing compound eyes, and long spear-like stingers designed for relentless attacks. Their appearance is intimidating and predatory, resembling apex hunters of the insect world rather than simple pollinators. Raw mana energy courses through their bodies as glowing veins of golden, amber, and pale blue light beneath their dark exoskeletons. Every movement leaves behind faint trails of magical energy, making the swarm appear like a supernatural storm crossing the battlefield. The hornets move with perfect coordination, forming enormous swirling clouds that blot out portions of the sky. Their countless wings generate violent turbulence, scattering dust, leaves, and debris across the landscape. The air is filled with a deafening buzzing roar created by thousands of wings beating in unison. Each hornet possesses an elongated stinger coated with volatile mana-infused venom. Glowing droplets of toxic energy trail behind their attacks, creating an atmosphere of constant danger. The swarm behaves as a single devastating force, overwhelming everything through numbers, speed, and coordination. Behind them, a massive unstable mana portal tears through reality, revealing glimpses of a prehistoric world dominated by giant insects, towering ancient plants, colossal ferns, and untamed wilderness. Magical lightning and dimensional distortions surround the portal, emphasizing their unnatural arrival. Below the swarm, the battlefield bears signs of devastation. Vegetation has been stripped away, terrain is scarred by repeated assaults, and clouds of dust, pollen, mana particles, and atmospheric haze fill the environment. The composition emphasizes overwhelming aerial dominance and relentless predatory behavior.

story: Deadscope has given his years to wars, and in return he has earned respect, not words. He is the oldest in the group, and this is measured not by age, but by the paths he has traveled. Even though he is in middle age, his gaze still searches for a target. So far, not a single shot has been wasted - this is not a legend, but a statistic. In Mission 1, he is here not only to shoot from a distance, but to pass on what he knows to the Soldier. Because a leader must know not only how to fight alone, but also how to shoot accurately.

name: Turtle
trait: QalxanńĪ qńĪrńĪldńĪqdan sonrakńĪ 3 saniy…ô …ôrzind…ô +75 Qalxan qazanar
story: The Iron Shell, a colossal prehistoric tortoise dragged through a mana portal from an ancient forgotten dimension. This mountain-sized beast is one of the oldest surviving creatures of its era, a living fortress whose immense presence dominates the battlefield. Its body resembles a gigantic ancient tortoise, but on a scale so massive that it appears more like a moving landmass than an animal. Its legendary shell has been hardened by millions of years of prehistoric volcanic pressure. The shell is covered with layers of dark volcanic stone, ancient mineral deposits, obsidian-like formations, and deep geological cracks glowing faintly with residual geothermal energy. Portions of the shell resemble miniature mountains, cliffs, and rocky ridges formed over countless ages. The creature's enormous limbs are thick and powerful, capable of supporting its unimaginable weight. Ancient scars, weathered textures, and prehistoric features cover its rugged skin, emphasizing its age and resilience. Every movement feels slow, deliberate, and unstoppable, as though the creature itself is a force of nature. Despite its peaceful appearance, the battlefield bears evidence of its immense power. Massive craters, fractured terrain, and shattered rock formations surround the creature, suggesting the devastating impact of its earth-shaking body slams. Dust clouds rise from the ground beneath its weight, while cracks spread outward through the landscape. Behind the tortoise, a gigantic unstable mana portal tears open reality. Through the dimensional rift, glimpses of its prehistoric homeland can be seen‚ÄĒvolcanic mountains, ancient forests, rivers of lava, and colossal extinct creatures roaming a primeval world. Powerful mana energy crackles around the portal, illuminating the scene with supernatural light. The environment emphasizes the creature's incredible scale. Tiny trees, boulders, and landscape features appear insignificant compared to the massive living fortress. Atmospheric dust, volcanic haze, and cinematic lighting create a dramatic sense of grandeur and ancient power.

name: Feral Wolf
trait: ńįlk 16 saniy…ô +100% HńĪz bonusu, ilk vuruŇüu ekstra +30% Hasar bonusu qazanar
story: The Pack Alpha, a gigantic prehistoric wolf dragged through a mana portal from an ancient untamed dimension. This apex pack hunter is far larger than any modern wolf, built entirely for speed, endurance, and ruthless pursuit. Its powerful body is covered in dense shadow-dark fur, creating the impression of a living predator emerging from the darkness of forgotten forests. The wolf possesses a lean yet heavily muscular frame designed for explosive acceleration. Powerful legs, broad shoulders, and razor-sharp claws allow it to move with terrifying speed across any terrain. Its massive jaws are filled with predatory fangs capable of tearing through prey with relentless efficiency. Scars across its body tell the story of countless battles fought in the brutal prehistoric wilderness. Its glowing eyes radiate primal intelligence and untamed aggression. The creature stands ready to strike at any moment, muscles tense and body lowered into a hunting stance. Every aspect of its appearance communicates danger, speed, and lethal instinct. Dark mist and drifting shadows swirl through its fur as it moves through an ancient forest environment. The battlefield is surrounded by towering prehistoric trees, enormous roots, dense vegetation, and remnants of forgotten ecosystems. Broken branches, claw marks, and disturbed earth reveal the path of a predator that dominates everything within its territory. Behind the beast, a crackling mana portal remains open, revealing glimpses of its original world‚ÄĒvast primeval forests stretching endlessly beneath storm-filled skies. Ancient wildlife can be faintly seen in the distance while magical energy distorts the edges of reality around the portal. The scene captures a moment of imminent attack. Dust, leaves, and debris are thrown into the air by the wolf's explosive movement, emphasizing its incredible speed and unpredictability. The atmosphere feels tense, primal, and dangerous, showcasing a creature that survives purely through instinct and relentless aggression.

story: Trac is the legendary champion of the realm, a man whose name is synonymous with victory. He has defended the kingdom‚Äôs borders countless times, becoming a living symbol of hope for his people. He wears a suit of brilliant, golden armor that shines so brightly it dazzles the eyes of any foe who dares to look at him. With his massive sword and unshakable courage, Trac stands at the front of every charge. He is not just a warrior; he is the golden pillar holding the entire kingdom together.

story: Tornado was once a merciful and gentle spirit, but over centuries, his compassion was replaced by a cold, relentless rage. Now, he uses his immense magical power only for destruction, leveling everything in his path. The winds that once brought life now carry only fury and chaos. He has become a sentient storm that seeks to erase the world he once cared for, leaving nothing behind but desolate ruins and the echoing sound of his wrath.

name: Dino
trait: H…ôr hasar verdikd…ô +2 Hasar bonusu (Max:24)
story: The Apex Prime, a massive prehistoric apex predator dragged through a mana portal from a forgotten primordial dimension. This ferocious bipedal carnivore embodies pure survival instinct, standing at the top of the ancient food chain. Its powerful body is covered in thick, battle-scarred leathery hide, showing countless signs of survival in a brutal prehistoric world. The creature possesses an enormous muscular frame supported by powerful hind legs capable of explosive movement. Its massive tail balances its body while helping it maintain agility despite its immense size. Rows of razor-sharp teeth fill its gigantic jaws, each tooth showing realistic wear from years of hunting prehistoric prey. Its claws are thick, deadly, and perfectly adapted for tearing through enemies. Dino stands in a dominant pose, unleashing a terrifying roar that echoes across the battlefield. The force of the roar visibly disturbs the environment, creating shockwaves through dust, debris, and the surrounding air. Smaller creatures in the distance appear intimidated by its overwhelming presence, emphasizing its role as the ultimate predator. Its eyes burn with primal intelligence and relentless aggression. Unlike supernatural monsters, Dino radiates the terrifying realism of a creature shaped solely by evolution, instinct, and survival. Every muscle, scar, and movement reflects raw prehistoric power. Behind the beast, an unstable mana portal remains open, revealing glimpses of its original prehistoric world. Ancient jungles, volcanic landscapes, colossal ferns, and distant extinct creatures can be seen through the dimensional rift. Blue and violet mana energy crackles around the portal, contrasting with the creature's natural and primitive appearance. The battlefield itself bears signs of devastation caused by its arrival. Broken stone, shattered trees, deep claw marks, and scattered debris surround the predator. Dust and atmospheric particles fill the air, creating a cinematic sense of scale and danger.

name: Tenta
trait: Eyni anda 5 f…ôrqli r…ôqib…ô hasar ver…ôr v…ô 1 saniy…ôlik 25% yavaŇüladar
story: The Abyssal Leviathan, an ancient multi-tentacled sea horror dragged through a mana portal from the deepest primordial oceans of a forgotten prehistoric dimension. This colossal creature is a living nightmare of the abyss, possessing an enormous central body surrounded by massive, powerful tentacles covered in ancient armor-like scales, scars, and bioluminescent markings from the depths where sunlight never existed. Recently torn from its underwater realm, Tenta is enveloped in swirling mana energy that allows it to survive and move effortlessly on dry land. Streams of glowing blue-violet mana flow through its body, forming luminous veins beneath its thick hide. The magical energy constantly shifts around the creature, adapting its physiology to the unfamiliar environment. Its gigantic tentacles dominate the scene, twisting and coiling through the battlefield with overwhelming force. Each limb is covered with intricate textures, prehistoric patterns, and powerful suction structures, emphasizing its immense strength. The tentacles extend in every direction, creating an intimidating silhouette that fills the landscape. The creature's eyes glow with confusion, rage, and primal instinct. It appears driven into madness by its sudden displacement from the ancient oceans, lashing out at everything around it. Fragments of shattered terrain, debris, and uprooted structures scatter across the battlefield as evidence of its destructive arrival. Behind Tenta, a massive unstable mana portal tears open reality itself. Through the portal, glimpses of an endless prehistoric ocean can be seen‚ÄĒtowering waves, ancient sea creatures, abyssal trenches, and mysterious underwater ruins illuminated by eerie deep-sea light. Magical distortions ripple outward from the portal, blending oceanic and terrestrial environments together. The battlefield is drenched with moisture, mist, and supernatural energy. Water streams from the creature's body while mana-infused fog fills the air. The atmosphere feels chaotic, ancient, and overwhelming, as though an impossible deep-sea predator has invaded a world where it does not belong. Ultra-realistic prehistoric sea monster, photorealistic creature design, highly detailed tentacles, realistic marine textures, ancient abyssal horror, cinematic lighting, volumetric mist, glowing mana energy, massive scale, realistic anatomy, environmental destruction, AAA game card art, Unreal Engine 5 quality, physically based rendering, hyper-detailed textures, masterpiece quality, 8K resolution, epic creature concept art, dynamic action scene, terrifying leviathan presence, atmospheric depth.

For years, he has stood as Trac‚Äôs most trusted shadow, covering his back in countless battles across the realm. He is a savior of many, having pulled the kingdom back from the brink of destruction multiple times. His arrows are not mere wood and steel; they are conduits of divine flame. Once he releases a shot, the fire pursues its target with a will of its own. No enemy can outrun his blazing reach, as he turns the battlefield into a wall of protecting light.

story: The Shadow Reaper was once a simple farmer, but his cruelty toward animals led to a terrifying eternal punishment. Now a vengeful spirit, he wanders in tattered black robes, gripping a massive, razor-sharp scythe. His glowing green eyes pierce through the darkness, searching for his next harvest. He treats the battlefield like his old fields, reaping souls with the same cold indifference he once showed his livestock. He is the grim reminder that every sin carries a heavy price in the afterlife.

story: The Glacial Terror, a colossal prehistoric apex predator pulled into the arena through an unstable mana portal from a frozen ancient dimension. This massive beast towers over the icy landscape, radiating primal dominance and overwhelming power. Its enormous body is covered in thick, rugged fur heavily coated with frost, snow, and jagged ice formations accumulated over countless ages in a prehistoric frozen wilderness. The creature possesses a powerful muscular build, enormous limbs, and massive claws capable of tearing through ancient forests and frozen terrain. Its gigantic jaw is lined with brutal prehistoric fangs, large enough to crush solid stone with ease. Frost hangs from its teeth and fur, while freezing breath escapes from its mouth in dense clouds of icy mist. Around the beast swirl violent glacial winds under its command. Snowstorms spiral around its body, carrying shards of ice and frozen particles through the air. The atmosphere bends beneath its presence as freezing currents spread across the battlefield, coating the ground with ice wherever it steps. Its eyes glow with ancient predatory intelligence, reflecting the untamed brutality of a creature that existed long before modern civilizations. Despite its immense size, Frostmaw appears unpredictable and ferocious, ready to lunge at any moment with explosive speed. Behind the creature, a massive unstable mana portal tears through reality, revealing glimpses of its original prehistoric frozen world. Through the portal, ancient glaciers, snow-covered mountains, and colossal extinct creatures can be faintly seen in the distance. Blue magical energy crackles around the dimensional rift, emphasizing its unnatural arrival. The environment is a frozen battlefield engulfed by blizzards, icy winds, and shattered glaciers. Snow and frost dominate the landscape, creating a dramatic and hostile atmosphere worthy of an ancient apex predator.

Standing two meters tall, this massive robot was created with a dual purpose: to hold the front lines as an impenetrable wall and to provide vital medical aid to the wounded. She is an engine of protection, ready for any type of combat while her internal systems work to heal those she guards. Unlike the aggressive machines of the farm, she is a nurturing giant, ensuring that every soldier returns home from the field.
